title: The Forbidden Forest Opens
description: The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Conis, Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, McKinley, Luffy. The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Look, the shop is floating in mid-air!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SO----NICE^^!! IF I ONLY HAD SOME MONEY.........!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Anyway, I hope the ship is okay.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: His face is weird. What's this?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stupid! This is art!! I can tell!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Eh!? You guys yearn for that long?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is there something wrong with you!?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: EEH!? We're leaving the city already!?

summary: The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.
